Taking p=q and d=1...
notes: registry_status=literature_implied_answer (negative answer to Open problem 3 only)
packet_title: Literature-Implied Answer: Arbitrary-Spectrum q>2 Sampling Is Not N polylog N
source_question: Source paper: V. N. Temlyakov, *Sampling discretization of integral norms of the hyperbolic cross polynomials*, arXiv:2005.05967. Location: Section 4, Open problem 3, lines 682-690 in the parsed source. Question: for each q in (2,infty) and d, whether every finite spectrum Q subset Z^d satisfies a Marcinkiewicz discretization theorem for Tr(Q) with only |Q| polylog |Q| sampling points.
source_title: Sampling discretization of integral norms of the hyperbolic cross polynomials
